div.h3: LSN = Byte Offset | Sequential I/O | O(1) Append

ol.li: Strict Ordering: Records are never written out of order.
Immutability: Once a byte is written at an offset, it is never modified. "3. LSN Property": "LSN[n+1] = LSN[n] + Length[n]."
Zero Padding: File gaps are prohibited to maintain LSN continuity.

g.text: lsn = logFile.Size() // LSN is current EOF

text.tspan: // Record @ Offset X has LSN X
// Record @ Offset X has LSN X
